title: evolvulus ericifolius
intro: Evolvulus ericifolius, commonly known as blue myrtle or beach morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus ericifolius include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Evolvulus ericifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies in various parts of the world.
